stages.label: Build Cloudflare Pages Functions bundle

stages.label: Set Pages runtime secrets
stages.command: Set Cloudflare Pages environment variables: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, ODDS_API_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, ALLOW_ORIGIN

stages.label: Authenticate Cloudflare deploy
stages.detail: Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, or run bunx wrangler login and set CLOUDFLARE_WRANGLER_LOGIN=1.

stages.label: Deploy app and same-origin backend routes
stages.detail: Complete Functions, runtime secrets and Cloudflare auth before deploying the same-origin backend routes.
